_meta.description: D6 fixtures for mastra / tool-rendering-default-catchall. Drives the built-in default catchall renderer with a weather-in-Tokyo prompt. The probe asserts [data-testid='copilot-tool-render'] with data-tool-name='get_weather' and a status pill.

fixtures._comment: default-catchall — weather in Tokyo. Follow-up content after get_weather tool ran. Keyed by toolCallId. MUST come before the tool-emitting fixture below.
default-catchall — weather in Tokyo, emit get_weather. Uses toolName gate.
default-catchall — weather in Tokyo, fallback content when no toolName gate matches.

response.content: The weather in Tokyo is currently 22°C with partly cloudy skies and light easterly winds.
